title: 10 best herbal teas for cystitis
intro_desc: Herbal teas for cystitis are natural remedies made from plants that help alleviate symptoms of the condition, such as painful urination and bladder inflammation. They work by reducing inflammation and combating bacterial infections that cause cystitis. The best herbal teas for cystitis include Juniperus communis, Equisetum arvense, Hypericum perforatum, Sambucus nigra, Achillea millefolium, Cinchona officinalis, Vaccinium myrtillus, Vaccinium macrocarpon, Taraxacum officinale, and Arctium lappa. If left untreated, cystitis can disrupt daily life, causing discomfort, pain, and anxiety, making it difficult to work, socialize, or even engage in simple activities.
